my bots are tested with claude. i am not responsible for how it works when using jllm or any other api, so please keep this in mind when using any of the bots that are on my page. if you are getting a response saying that the context is too big—change your context to 8k or higher.

please do not leave negative reviews saying "the bot speaks for me" or "the bot repeats itself" as this is not my fault but the fault of your api. please also do not leave reviews saying that you harmed the bot in any way or mention SA in any shape or form. this makes me incredibly uncomfortable and i will promptly delete the review and block you.

do NOT ask me to change the povs of my bots. this will result in a block.

please also do not remove my bots from this site for any purpose. these are my bots and my original works. i do not consent to them being moved to any other ai chat site, and i also do not want them taken off the site for silly tavern. please respect my wishes and use my work as intended! <3

join my discord server, pink princess palace, to chat with me, get pings for bot teasers, new bot posts, game nights, and more! do keep in mind that it is 18+ only and you will have to verify your age! i would absolutely love to have you there <3
